mechanics.excerpt: series of military exercises held between 3026 and 3028 Hanse had moved vast numbers of troops under the guise of training He had also reorganized his army; regrouping battalions and regiments into Regimental Combat Teams con- sisting of one Or more regiments of BattleMechs plus armor; infantry ad artillery support: This organization gave Davion troops overwhelming advantages.
